title: Set credentials provider explicitly for AwsClient
description: When creating a new AwsClient, always set the credentials provider explicitly. Not specifying it can lead to authentication failures or the use of unintended credentials, which may cause security or operational issues.
recommendation: Always specify the credentials provider explicitly when constructing an AwsClient instance.

noncompliant: AwsClient client = AwsClient.builder().build(); // No credentials provider specified

checks.message: Always specify the credentials provider explicitly when constructing an AwsClient instance.
